creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
FreeCAD for QT5 has been updated by cmt@ in version 0.17-13541.

In addition, it is not necessary to make a development version, since FreeCAD 0.18 was released 2 days ago (even if it says "UNDER CONSTRUCTION" https://github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD/releases/tag/0.18)
